zh.Leegomery Manor, Wellington, Shropshire,: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾維林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Cumbre於大約1130年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Alured de Cumbre29歲，母親Mrs. Alured de Cumbre28歲。他去世於大約1213年在英國英格蘭爾盧可享年85歲。

zh-hans.Leegomery Manor, Wellington, Shropshire,: 英国英格兰史洛普爾維林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Cumbre于大约1130年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Alured de Cumbre29岁，母亲Mrs. Alured de Cumbre28岁。他去世于大约1213年在英国英格兰爾盧可享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cumbre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Caliste, Francois, Lucien.

French: metonymic occupational name denoting someone who worked in the private quarters of his master, rather than the public halls of the manor, from c(h)ambre ‘room’, or a habitational name from Le Cambre or La Cambre, the names of a few places in the north of France. Compare Delcambre .

variants.name: Kamper
meanings: German (Westphalia) and Dutch: topographic name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of   Kamp   1.

variants.name: Delcambre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Patrice, Gaston, Jacques, Minos.
French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from Le Cambre or La Cambre, the names of a few places in the north of France. Compare Cambre .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Cumbre was born about 1130, in Shropshire, England, his father, Alured de Cumbre, was 29 and his mother, Mrs. Alured de Cumbre, was 28. He died about 1213, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Cumbre est né environ 1130, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Alured de Cumbre, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alured de Cumbre, avait 28 ans. Il est décédé environ 1213, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Cumbre um 1130 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alured de Cumbre 29 und seine Mutter Mrs. Alured de Cumbre 28. Er starb um 1213 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Cumbre è nato il circa 1130 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Alured de Cumbre, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Alured de Cumbre, aveva 28 anni. Morì circa 1213, nel Runcorn, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Cumbre родился около 1130 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alured de Cumbre было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alured de Cumbre, 28. Он умер около 1213 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.
